description: Style NoteLuxurious comfort is teamed with style in these pair of white shoes from gliders. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style for a dashing sporty look. Product DetailsRound blunt toed white shoes with lace-up fastening Synthetic upper, has overlay on the toe box, reinforced overlay at the heel collar and branding in the midfoot region, heel collar and tongue Soft footbed with slightly padded inner and tongue Foamy rubber midsole Rubber outsole with terraced lugs Comes with a shoe bag Material and CareSynthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth when required
